mapper.sql: t0.id, t0.tenant_id, t0.creator, t0.create_stamp, t0.last_editor, t0.last_edit_stamp, t0.estimate_id, t0.estimate_money, t0.estimate_date,t0.estimate_end_date, t0.agency_fee, t0.contacts, t0.contacts_phone, t0.dispose_programme, t0.month_rent, t0.year_rent, t0.margin, t0.lease_term_start, t0.lease_term_end, t0.payment_cycle, t0.lessee, t0.lease_purpose, t0.flow_state, t0.remark, t0.is_deleted, t0.is_estimate, t0.intermediary_id, t0.intermediary_fee
